categories.title: Energy Management
categories.description: Overview and evidence for energy efficiency.
categories.purpose: Reduce energy consumption and improve efficiency across facilities.
criteriaSummary: Implement energy monitoring systems.
Adopt LED lighting and efficient HVAC.
Set reduction targets aligned with GREENOFFICE_2569.

categories.title: Water Management
categories.purpose: Optimize water usage and implement conservation measures.
criteriaSummary: Install water metering systems.
Implement leak detection and repair programs.
Promote water-efficient fixtures.

categories.title: Waste Management
categories.purpose: Minimize waste generation and maximize recycling and responsible disposal.
criteriaSummary: Implement waste segregation and recycling programs.
Track waste volumes by type and disposal route.
Set reduction targets aligned with GREENOFFICE_2569.

categories.title: GHG Emissions
categories.headline: Greenhouse Gas Emissions
categories.purpose: Measure, report, and reduce greenhouse gas emissions across operations.
criteriaSummary: Establish GHG inventory for Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions.
Identify emission reduction opportunities.
Report progress against reduction targets.

categories.title: Indoor Environmental Quality
categories.purpose: Maintain healthy indoor environments for occupants through air quality and comfort standards.
criteriaSummary: Monitor indoor air quality parameters.
Maintain ventilation and thermal comfort standards.
Use low-emission materials and cleaning products.

categories.title: Transportation
categories.purpose: Promote sustainable commuting and reduce transport-related environmental impact.
criteriaSummary: Encourage public transit, cycling, and carpooling.
Track fleet fuel consumption and emissions.
Support remote work and virtual meetings where appropriate.

categories.title: Innovation and Additional Features
categories.purpose: Demonstrate leadership through innovative green initiatives beyond core criteria.
criteriaSummary: Implement pilot projects for emerging sustainability practices.
Engage staff in green innovation programs.
Share best practices with external stakeholders.
